allow: PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ajsc1\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-ajsc1-OneDrive-Desktop-ASQ-Ashlee\\cec736bf-1f1c-47ad-9a6b-b0ec28cae305.jsonl" -Tail 100 | ForEach-Object { try { \($_ | ConvertFrom-Json\).message.content | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'text' -and $_.text -match 'compact|summary|batch|artwork_id|product' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty text } catch {} } | Where-Object { $_ } | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ajsc1\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-ajsc1-OneDrive-Desktop-ASQ-Ashlee\\cec736bf-1f1c-47ad-9a6b-b0ec28cae305.jsonl" | ForEach-Object { try { $msg = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; $content = $msg.message.content; if \($content\) { foreach \($c in $content\) { if \($c.type -eq 'text' -and $c.text -match 'artwork_id|page_id|art-piece'\) { Write-Output $c.text; break } } } } catch {} } | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ajsc1\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-ajsc1-OneDrive-Desktop-ASQ-Ashlee\\cec736bf-1f1c-47ad-9a6b-b0ec28cae305.jsonl" | ForEach-Object { try { $obj = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; $content = $obj.message.content; if \($content\) { foreach \($c in $content\) { if \($c.type -eq 'tool_use' -and $c.name -match 'query'\) { Write-Output "TOOL: $\($c.name\)"; Write-Output "INPUT: $\(\($c.input | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, \($c.input | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\).Length\)\)\)"; break } } } } catch {} } | Select-Object -First 40)
